title: アオハル杯2戦目・お、惜しい～！

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
How unfortunate that we tied! Everyone worked
so hard, but we're not quite there yet!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to do my best to increase our chances of
victory next time!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
With your permission, I'd like to rearrange the
interior of the clubroom!
